description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named nrf52840_dk that triggers on push and pull request target events to the master branch, specifically for changes to src, examples, ci, .github/workflows, CMakeLists.txt, platformio.ini, library.json, and library.properties. Use a job named build that inherits from a template in .github/workflows/build_template.yml, passing nrf52840_dk as an argument.
